description: Detects ransomware preparation against backup and snapshot infrastructure
recommended_actions: Immediately isolate the source host from backup networks
Disable active sessions from the suspected account
Validate backup job and repository integrity
Confirm whether snapshots or restore points were deleted
Preserve backup server logs and remote command history
Review other hosts for similar recovery impairment behavior

tuning_notes.severity_escalation: Keep CRITICAL for destructive backup or snapshot actions
